ideation: This animation sequence portrays a robot carefully holding a chestnut, emphasizing the delicate nature of the object. It starts with both arms at the sides, then brings the hands together in a cupping motion before gently closing around the imaginary chestnut. Finally, the robot brings the chestnut up to eye level to admire it, before returning to a resting position. Each frame represents a significant change in arm position.  The animation uses a slow, deliberate pace, highlighting the careful handling of the chestnut. The robot's movements are gentle and precise, reflecting the emotion of appreciation for the small, delicate object.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to receive
hands lift and cup gently together
fingers close around the delicate chestnut
robot admires the chestnut held at eye level
arms return to rest, task complete
